name: Gatchiri @Ignister
name_jp: ガッチリ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>＠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イグニスター
desc:
The first time each Cyberse monster you control would be destroyed by a card effect each turn, it is not destroyed. You can only use each of the following effects of "Gatchiri @Ignister" once per turn.
● You can target 1 Cyberse Effect Monster you control; negate its effects, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand.
● If this card is sent from the field to your GY: You can target 1 face-up monster you control; that target is unaffected by your opponent's card effects until the end of your opponent's turn.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Negates the effects of your Effect Monsters
Unaffected by the opponent's card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
